Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Susan Lee.
Atty. Michael Sullivan, Esq. for Plaintiff: World School of Massage and Holistic Arts. Patricia Cramer, witness for the plaintiff has been sworn and examined..

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court took the matter under submission.
(PRAYER- $722,855.00)

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Continued To Jan-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Michael R. Sullivan, Esq. for Plaintiff: World School of Massage and Holistic Healing Arts. Plaintiff's Witness: Patricia Kramer, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court orders the matter continued to Jan. 30, 2007 at 9:00 AM in Dept.218. Plaintiff to submit a Brief re: receipts and documentation for losses incurred no later than Jan.26, 2007.
